content: Agency copilot is internal only, and  gives you access to MCP servers and skills
Sometimes, even if an agent is setup to have MCP servers and connections like WorkIQ, you must specifically name them in your prompt
No connector and no download button? Give the agent the exact URL and tell it which elements to read straight from the rendered page.
M365 chat  hallucinates totals, or needs effort from Microsoft to ingest grounded, properly referenced answers.. A CLI agent downloads the real file and computes real answers.
Chat can describe cleanup; the agent writes the file. Name the exact columns and filename.
Give the agent only the blog post. It has to navigate to the public data itself, then verify — and honestly flag any claim the data can't confirm.
If at first you don't succeed try again. Then your courage should appear, For if you will persevere, You will conquer, never fear; Try, try again. (Sharepoint MCP times out frequently)
One chart shows counts; a dashboard tells the story. Sum the dollars per attorney, tally the priorities. (SharePoint MCP still times out - persevere.)
Dates are where the risk hides. Do the math from today and let red mean 'now'. (One SharePoint call - keep it lean.)
Turn on Plan Mode (Shift+Tab), read the plan it proposes, then approve it to run. Real work fetches data once and reuses the local copy.
Plan first, review, then let it build. The prize is a reusable tool, not a one-off answer.
Plan it, review the steps, then run. Python can serve a folder locally on localhost - no cloud, no deploy, nothing leaves your laptop.
